data.name: Easy Money
data.detailed_description:
與院長會面後，艾蜜莉意識到掌控人生遠比想像中艱難。她仍面臨資金短缺、債務攀升，且無法再依賴獎學金。面對現實，她決定以肉體換取金錢。

由此展開她隱秘人生的旅程：密室幽會、坦率對話、互惠交易，以及各方追逐自身目標的權謀博弈。昔日的優等生，如今成了人們願意付費購買時間的女孩。越是深入其中，越是清晰地體悟到：快速賺取的金錢，永遠伴隨著代價。

遊戲特色：

• 深層情感敘事
• 全方位第一人稱沉浸體驗
• 電影級動畫表現
• 氛圍感音效設計
• 寫實角色建模

data.short_description: 《輕鬆賺錢》是一款以第一人稱視角呈現的坦率遊戲，講述學生艾蜜莉陷入財務困境的故事。由於拖欠兩學期學費，院長威脅要開除她，卻同時提出一項將決定她大學前途的交易。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-10100
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti 4GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Easy Money
data.detailed_description:
After meeting with the dean, Emily realizes that taking control of her life will be more difficult than she thought. She still doesn't have enough money, her debts are growing, and she can no longer rely on a scholarship. Faced with this reality, she decides to sleep with men for money.

Thus begins her journey into a hidden life: meetings behind closed doors, frank conversations, mutual favors, and deals where everyone pursues their own goals. Yesterday's straight-A student has become a girl whose time people are willing to pay for. The further she goes, the clearer it becomes that quick money always comes at a price.

Game features:

• Deep emotional narrative
• Full first-person immersion
• Cinematic animations
• Atmospheric sound design
• Realistic character models

data.short_description: Easy Money is a candid, first-person game about Emily, a student who finds herself at a financial impasse. With two semesters of unpaid tuition, the dean threatens to expel her but offers a deal that will determine her future at the university.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Greek, Danish, Indonesian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-10100
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti 4GB
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

Recommended:
